title: catesbaea phyllacantha
intro: Catesbaea phyllacantha, also known as the thorny catesbaea or the thorny shrub, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to the Caribbean and Central America. The medicinal properties of Catesbaea phyllacantha include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable component in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, Catesbaea phyllacantha can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
